hero.sub: INOid is your digital asset management system — from commissioning to decommissioning. Ready in 5 minutes.

qs.intro: Four steps to master the essentials of INOid.
qs.s1desc: Go to Assets → tap "+ New". Add title, category, photos and technical data.
qs.s2desc: Press the scan button in the center of the navigation. The camera opens immediately.
qs.s3desc: Open an asset → Service log → "+ Entry". Document maintenance, repairs and inspections.
qs.s4desc: In the service log → "+ Interval". Choose an interval (weekly to 2-yearly) and set the next due date.

feat.intro: Tap a feature to see details.

f1.title: Asset Management
f1.desc: All equipment in one place. Each asset gets a unique ID, photos, technical & commercial master data, and an automatically generated QR code.
points: Status: Active, Defective, In Maintenance, Decommissioned + custom
Duplicate asset for fast serial entry

f2.title: Service Log
f2.desc: Complete documentation of all events on the asset – from inspection to incident. Attach photos and documents directly.
points: 10 system types + custom types (Settings → Event Types)
Maintenance plan as Gantt chart in service log

f3.title: Maintenance Intervals & Checklists
f3.desc: Never miss recurring appointments. Define intervals per asset, add step-by-step checklists and keep track of all due dates.
points: Checklist appears on completion for ticking off
Mark maintenance as done from list or Gantt
Next date automatically advanced on completion

f4.title: Maintenance Dashboard
f4.desc: All due maintenance at a glance. Filter, search and Gantt chart for a complete overview of all assets.
points: Task list: grouped by Overdue / This Week / 30 Days / Later
Gantt chart with heatmap (more intense the closer the date)
Search across all asset attributes (name, serial no., category, …)
Filter: urgency, category, entries per page
Time range filter controls Gantt view simultaneously

f5.title: QR & NFC Scanner
f5.desc: Access any asset instantly by scanning – no searching, no typing. Works with the browser camera, no app download needed.
points: Scan QR code → open asset directly
Automatically generated QR code per asset

f6.title: Locations & Structure
f6.desc: Map your operational structure exactly: Location → Hall → Area. Each asset can be assigned to an area.

f7.title: Teams & Roles
f7.desc: Multiple employees, clear responsibilities. Invite colleagues and assign roles – each role sees and can do exactly what it should.

f8.title: Documents
f8.desc: Manuals, inspection reports, certificates – stored directly on the asset. Photos in the service log for complete documentation.

f9.title: QR Codes & NFC
f9.desc: Every asset automatically gets a unique QR code. Stick it on the device and scan it anytime for instant access.
points: QR code displayed directly in the app
Accessible without app via browser link

f10.title: Team Chat
f10.desc: Direct real-time communication within your team – no external tools needed. Mention assets with @ and link them directly in the conversation.
points: Real-time messages for all org members
Mention assets with @name – direct link to the device
Role-colored avatars show who is writing
Text only – no file or image clutter

roles.intro: INOid uses three roles. Assign each employee the most restrictive appropriate role.
roles.tip: Manage roles under Teams → select member → change role. Add new members via Teams → open team → add member.

plans.intro: INOid offers four plans. Payment is by bank transfer – no subscription trap, no credit card required. After payment you receive a code by email that you redeem directly.
plans.tip: Activation code: The code is automatically sent by email to all Admins after payment. Make sure at least one admin has a reachable email address.

bs1.title: Choose plan
bs1.desc: Go to Subscription (Sidebar → Organization). Choose your plan and click "Create Invoice".

bs2.title: Fill in & download invoice
bs2.desc: Fill in the billing address (name/company, street, postcode/city, country, VAT ID optional). The invoice is shown immediately and can be printed.

bs3.title: Transfer payment
bs3.desc: Transfer the invoice amount to the specified bank account (Inomet GmbH). Use the invoice number as payment reference.

bs4.title: Receive activation code
bs4.desc: After payment you automatically receive a 9-digit activation code by email to all admins of your organization.

bs5.title: Redeem code & activate plan
bs5.desc: Go back to Subscription, enter the code in the "Redeem activation code" field and click "Activate". The plan is active immediately.

tips.intro: Pro tips for getting the most out of INOid.
tips.t1: Duplicating assets saves time when recording identical devices.
tips.t2: Done early? Just tap the green checkmark button in the maintenance dashboard – the next date is calculated automatically.
tips.t3: Assign each employee the most restrictive role – Reader for external auditors.
tips.t4: INOid runs as a PWA: add a home screen link on your smartphone for an app-like feel.
tips.t5: Check the maintenance dashboard daily – overdue intervals are marked in red.
tips.contactDesc: Contact your administrator or reach INOid support directly via Inomet GmbH.

roles.subtitle: Define who can do what in your organization.

superadmin.label: Superadmin
superadmin.description: Full access over all areas – role cannot be changed by other admins

admin.label: Admin
admin.description: Full access: manage assets, service, org structure, teams & members

techniker.label: Technician
techniker.description: Edit assets & service, read-only org structure

leser.label: Reader
leser.description: Read-only access, no editing or creation
